summary: Frontend E2E verification of /branch-orders 'طلب جديد من قسم التصنيع' dialog: cost-per-unit bug FIX + new unit dropdown FEATURE. All 8 scenarios PASSED. Cost preview now uses unit_cost_after_waste (~6,412 IQD/حبة) NOT the wrong batch cost (~641,168). Unit dropdown shows حبة/غرام/كغم and converts كغم→حبة with info toast.

issues: Per-unit cost is displayed as rounded whole IQD (6,412) instead of two-decimal (6,411.68); line total likewise shows 64,117 (vs 64,116.80) and 25,647 (vs 25,646.72). Correctness is preserved (rounding only) but problem statement expected 2 decimals. Minor – consider toLocaleString with minimumFractionDigits:2 for consistency.

action_items: Optional polish: in BranchOrders.js item-line cost formatter, use {minimumFractionDigits:2, maximumFractionDigits:2} so 6,411.68 / 64,116.80 / 25,646.72 render precisely instead of rounded 6,412 / 64,117 / 25,647.
critical_code_review_comments: Pre-login /api/branches returns 403 (console error 'Failed to fetch branches: AxiosError'). The page retries after token is set so end-user is not affected, but a first-paint axios call fires before auth header is ready – consider gating fetches on auth-ready flag.
localhost:9999 (local print agent) ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED — expected in preview env; unchanged from prior iterations.
seed_data_creation: Used pre-seeded manufactured products: لحم برغر (unit حبة, piece_weight 250, unit_cost_after_waste 6411.68, qty 100), كراة مشروم (unit حبة, unit_cost_after_waste 3403.19). Branch: الفرع الرئيسي.
context_for_next_testing_agent: On /branch-orders, the New-Order dialog has THREE comboboxes (receiving branch, priority, product). Scope selectors with `page.locator('[role=dialog]').first.locator(...)` because page-level filter combobox 'جميع الطلبات' will otherwise match `[role=combobox]:nth(0)`. The unit dropdown (data-testid=branch-order-unit) renders ONLY after a product is selected; it sits between qty and product comboboxes inside the green 'إضافة منتج من التصنيع' panel. لحم برغر options confirmed: حبة, غرام, كغم. Conversion toast wording: 'تم تحويل 1 كغم → 4.000 حبة'. After submit success toast 'تم إرسال الطلب للتصنيع' appears and order row shows in list with summary 'لحم برغر: 4 حبة' + IQD 25,647.
verified_scenarios: Login admin@maestroegp.com → /branch-orders, splash dismissed, 'طلب جديد' button visible
Click 'طلب جديد' opens dialog 'طلب جديد من قسم التصنيع'
Receiving branch combobox lists 'الفرع الرئيسي' (1 option) and selects
Product combobox lists 'لحم برغر (متوفر: 100 حبة)' and 'كراة مشروم (متوفر: 100 حبة)'
AFTER selecting لحم برغر: data-testid='branch-order-unit' appears (count=1) AND data-testid='branch-order-qty' present; unit options = ['حبة','غرام','كغم'] (all 3 expected units)
qty=10 حبة + add → item line 'لحم برغر (10.00 حبة × 6,412 IQD)' total IQD 64,117 (≈64,116.8). NO 6,411,682 / 641,168 wrong batch cost
Remove + re-add with unit=كغم qty=1 → info toast 'تم تحويل 1 كغم → 4.000 حبة'; item line 'لحم برغر (1 كغم = 4.00 حبة × 6,412 IQD)' total IQD 25,647 (≈25,646.72)
Click 'إنشاء الطلب' → success toast 'تم إرسال الطلب للتصنيع', order appears in list 'لحم برغر: 4 حبة' IQD 25,647
rca_of_the_issue: Bug was that BranchOrders.js item-cost formula used raw_material_cost (whole-batch cost in IQD) per piece, producing huge per-unit costs like 641,168 / millions for the line. Fix: new helpers getProductUnitCost (uses unit_cost_after_waste returned by GET /manufactured-products) and convertToMainUnit (auto-converts غرام/كغم to the product's main unit حبة using piece_weight) — now per-unit cost = 6,411.68 IQD/حبة and 1 كغم of لحم برغر (piece_weight 250g) correctly converts to 4 حبة → 4 × 6,411.68 = 25,646.72 IQD. Verified via UI.
